locations.planning_policy: Coach may design complete sessions with home equipment, subject to Promaestro V5 priorities and injury constraints.
locations.notes: Examples: front squat with Ohio Bar, landmine press, ring row, kettlebell goblet squat, Pallof press with bands, step-up with box, foam roller.

locations.planning_policy: Plan intention, RPE, restrictions and adaptation criteria. Do not use inventory_home_v4.
locations.notes: Example: Hibrido fuera de casa can include RPE 7-8, avoid heavy deadlift, control jumps, adapt if lumbar > 2/10.

locations.planning_policy: Use only material stated by the user, the gym context, or the external workout.
locations.notes: Do not assume home rack, home kettlebells, home wall ball or home rings.

locations.planning_policy: Treat as guided external session. Record objective, duration, restrictions and notes.
locations.notes: Yoga or class details can be recorded if dictated by the user.

locations.planning_policy: Ask clarification or plan without concrete equipment.

critical_rule: inventory_home_v4 applies only when location_type is home.
